summary: The diff implements all four requirements with good coverage. Backend adds FeedbackSubmission type, stable storage, and the three required functions. Frontend adds the FeedbackModal, FeedbackSubmissions component, three hooks, wires the Feedback button through App.tsx/Layout.tsx, and integrates the section into AdminPanel. One minor AC gap exists: the submitterUserId field is stored but the backend's actual derivation logic (8-char base-36 hash from caller principal) is not visible in the truncated diff. The AdminPanel section visibility gating by isOwner/isAdmin is also not clearly shown in the truncated AdminPanel diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: submitFeedback must capture and store the caller's derived user ID as an 8-char base-36 hash
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and the actual submitFeedback implementation body is not visible, so it cannot be confirmed that the submitterUserId is derived as an 8-char base-36 hash of the caller principal as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Feedback Submissions section must be gated and only visible to admins and owner
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminPanel.tsx diff is truncated and the portion showing the Feedback section render including any isOwner/isAdmin gate around FeedbackSubmissions is cut off. It cannot be confirmed that the section is conditionally rendered only for admins/owner.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (migration.mo) was added to handle schema evolution from old actor state to new actor state with feedbackSubmissions and currentSubmissionId fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for stable storage of submissions and reuse of existing admin/owner check patterns. It did not request a migration module or explicit migration pattern. The migration.mo file was added beyond what was specified.
